accountDeletion.title: Delete Account
accountDeletion.warning: This will schedule your account for permanent deletion. You have 30 days to cancel before all your data is permanently removed.
accountDeletion.bullet1: • Your account will be deactivated immediately
accountDeletion.bullet2: • Your books and exchanges will be hidden
accountDeletion.bullet3: • After 30 days, all data is permanently erased
accountDeletion.bullet4: • You can cancel within the 30-day window

accountDeletion.pendingTapCancel: Tap here to cancel and restore your account.
accountDeletion.cancelledMessage: Your account has been restored. You can log in again.
